---
slug: example-slug              # kebab-case; stable; NEVER rename after first publish — it's the article's Intercom identity
title: Article title here
collection: getting-started     # must match a slug in collections.yaml
locale: en                      # must be in collections.yaml → locales.available
state: draft                    # 'draft' (local only) or 'published' (pushed to Intercom)
---

Write your article body here in standard CommonMark Markdown.

## Section heading

Body paragraph. Use headings, lists, code blocks, and inline formatting freely —
they are converted to HTML before being sent to Intercom.

## Next steps

- Link to related articles by their slug (not filename).
- Keep articles focused: one task or concept per article.
